experience.description: Contributed to the development of SaaS platforms, full-stack web applications, and Android applications using React, TypeScript, Supabase, and Vercel deployment. Collaborated with dev teams leveraging modern AI tools (Claude, Google AI Studio, Lovable, Android Studio) for rapid development.

Developed a Python application to automate asset data extraction from HTML files using BeautifulSoup. Integrated user-friendly file upload interface. Exported structured asset information into Excel with Pandas for reporting.

projects.title: Civic Desk
projects.description: Developed an AI-powered civic issue management platform to streamline reporting of urban problems. Implemented image classification and location input for automated complaint detection. Enhanced transparency through real-time tracking dashboards.

projects.title: Career Clarity Hub Web App
projects.description: Developed an AI-powered platform providing personalized career suggestions using Gemini AI. Built responsive Streamlit UI with CSS. Integrated resume analysis and job-matching features.

certifications: Machine Learning with Python – IBM Cognitive Class
